# Suggested PR labels

Create these once under **Issues → Labels** (or via `gh label create`):

| Label | Color (hex) | Meaning |
|-------|-------------|---------|
| `accepted` | `0E8A16` | Submission accepted |
| `needs-changes` | `FBCA04` | Waiting on team fixes |
| `rejected` | `B60205` | Not accepted |
| `under-review` | `1D76DB` | Being judged |
